posts.author: vnktshb
posts.community: Tips Industries Limited - Ready to RACE ahead!
posts.text: rowth targets (conservative framing) FY27 target maintained at ~20% topline and ~20% bottom-line growth: CMD: “our target is to achieve… 20% on top-line growth and 20% bottom-line growth.” Despite strong FY26 delivery, management refused to “over-promise”: “I don’t want to over-promise. So let’s keep the target at present 20-20%… Let one, two quarters pass…” They expect continued support from catalogue and platform monetization trends; noted that quarterly variability can occur due to viral trends and release timing. image 1249×603 74.5 KB
